← Work

Montashiri Villa

Villas · Obhur, Jeddah · 2025

How does an urban house keep its privacy without closing itself off? The stone facade grades between solid volumes and openings shaded by timber screens, while the roofscape becomes a second layer of living — planted terraces, pergolas, and a sky pool overlooking Obhur.

Location
Obhur, Jeddah
Year
2025
Category
Villas
Status
In design
Services
Architectural concept · Interior direction · Build-ready design

The volumes arrange themselves around small light courts, drawing daylight deep into the house while keeping full privacy from street and neighbours. Planting is not an afterthought — it is part of the facade's composition, tempering the climate and shading the openings.

Above, the house reclaims the ground it occupies: planted terraces, shaded sitting areas and a family pool with an open view — a full storey of open-air living.

Next project

Byblos Resort →

Ready to review your plot?

A free call, then a free preliminary concept — we only begin a paid agreement after the direction is clear and aligned.

A personal architecture practice for private villas and homes across Jeddah, Saudi Arabia and the Gulf — shaped by clarity, restraint and long-term value.
